impact: This unblocks the ordered checkbox-27 recovery sequence by replacing the repeatedly malformed mutation-test proposal with one narrow unittest file that only validates the committed categoryRecords fixture against the accepted checkbox-24 shape, leaving mutation cases for later daemon cycles.
summary: Add a py_compile-safe checkbox-27a lifecycle requirement fixture validator skeleton.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-31: Recovery for checkbox-27a: add only a py_compile-safe skeleton for `ppd/tests/test_permit_lifecycle_requirement_extraction_mutations.py` that loads `ppd/tests/fixtures/lifecycle/permit_lifecycle_requirement_extraction_expected_output.json` and asserts the committed top-level `categoryRecords` fixture is valid using the accepted checkbox-24 schema. Do not add mutation cases in this task. Follow `ppd/daemon/SUPERVISOR_REPAIR_GUIDE.md` exactly for this recovery and keep the proposal to one Python test file.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
